Bash(cd "C:/Users/timsc/Dropbox/GitHub/maine-town-quiz" && rm cumberland_original_backup.geojson cumberland_topo_2pct.geojson && for county in androscoggin aroostook franklin hancock kennebec knox lincoln oxford penobscot piscataquis sagadahoc somerset waldo washington york; do echo "Simplifying $county..." && geo2topo ${county}=${county}.geojson | toposimplify -P 0.02 | topo2geo ${county}=- > ${county}_simplified.geojson && mv ${county}_simplified.geojson ${county}.geojson; done && echo "All done")
